channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why gold never tarnishes has finally been explained
item.description: Researchers have discovered that gold atoms on the surface reorganize themselves, which may explain its resistance to tarnishing.

item.title: Rare fossil goose rewrites the story of New Zealand's giant birds
item.description: A newly discovered fossil goose challenges a long-standing theory about the evolution of New Zealand's large bird species.

item.title: Scientists warn invasive Asian mantises threaten Europe's wildlife
item.description: Two Asian praying mantis species, now officially classified as invasive, have spread rapidly across Europe, raising concerns.

item.title: Why the human body has so many design flaws
item.description: Many of the body's major flaws stem from evolution building on old designs rather than starting from scratch.
